cover_letter_preview:
Dear Hiring Team,

The iCIMS ATS Administrator role at Enterprise Solution Inc. caught my attention because the core of the work, system configuration, user support and training, data integrity, and building reporting that actually helps a team make decisions, maps directly to what I did as Manager at BEAT THE BOMB. I spent roughly a year and a half owning a help desk ticketing system, authoring SOPs and runbooks that let junior staff resolve issues without escalation, tracking operational KPIs, and coordinating across departments to keep processes consistent and documented.

On the system administration and documentation side: at BEAT THE BOMB I was the person who codified recurring fix paths into written runbooks, maintained onboarding documentation, and kept the help desk queue moving with clear status communication to non-technical staff. That same habit, spot a repeated friction point, write it down, make it repeatable, is exactly what an ATS administrator does when building workflow guides and training materials for recruiters and hiring managers. I also tracked operational KPIs and contributed to root cause analysis and incident reporting, so producing and distributing regul…
